Author: Carcosa Lyuman
Name: Ultrawide Cutscenes Community
Punchline: Remove letterboxing from cutscenes on ultrawide monitors.
Description:
This community-maintained fork removes the "letterboxing" bars when watching cutscenes on ultrawide monitors.
Beware! You may see things outside the intended frame, such as upcoming NPCs popping in or T-posing.

Original implementation by goat and Maple. Thanks to aers for the native discovery.
